profile.title: Profile
profile.moneySaved: You have saved a total of
profile.logoutConfirm: Are you sure you want to log out?
profile.newPasswordPlaceholder: Leave empty to keep current password
profile.updateFailed: An error occurred while updating profile.
profile.helpCenterDesc: For issues regarding orders, payments or account operations, you can contact us via the Help Center.
profile.termsDesc: By using the FoodyGo app, you agree to the following terms of service.
profile.helpCenterIntro: FoodyGo is a mobile app that brings consumable surplus food at the end of the day from restaurants to users at affordable prices.
profile.faqQ1: How can I place an order?
profile.faqA1: You can browse restaurants from the home page, select a suitable surprise box, add it to your cart, and complete your order.
profile.faqA2: The suspended meal feature is a social solidarity system that allows meal donations to support those in need.
profile.faqQ3: What should I do if I have a problem?
profile.faqA4: No, FoodyGo currently only operates on a 'Pick-up' basis. After placing your order, you must visit the restaurant in person within the pickup time window to collect your surprise box.
profile.terms1Desc: FoodyGo aims to offer users consumable surplus products from restaurants and cafes without wasting them.
profile.terms2Desc: Users are responsible for providing accurate information during registration and protecting account security. Accounts violating app rules may be suspended.
profile.terms3Desc: The user is obliged to pick up their ordered products from the restaurant within the specified pickup times. Uncollected products are not refundable.
profile.terms4Desc: The suspended meal system was developed to support social solidarity. Donations are recorded to be delivered to those in need. In case of abuse detection, the transaction is canceled.
profile.terms5Desc: User information is only used to provide app services and is securely stored. It is not shared with third parties without permission.
profile.terms6Desc: Payments made by users are protected by security protocols. Amounts specified in purchases and donations are collected instantly.
